name: python3-json-log-formatter
title: python3-json-log-formatter
description:
JSON formatter logging for Python
This library allows one to configure Python logging to
use a JSON formatter.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-json-log-formatter because JSON formatter logging for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-json-log-formatter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-json-log-formatter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-json-log-formatter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
